description:
## Goal
Lock destructuring's three-path-plus-repl parity behind the fixture matrix so regressions can't sneak back in.

## Depends on
- T2 (so irrefutable destructures don't trip warnings-as-errors).
- T3 (so the interp leg passes for list-cons).

## Scope
Add fixture-matrix entries (`tests/fixture_matrix.rs`) exercising:
- Irrefutable tuple destructure: `{a, b} = pair()`.
- Refutable list-cons destructure: `[h | t] = xs` (with `match_error` path tested where applicable).
- Mixed nested: `{[h | t], y} = e`.

Each fixture runs across all four legs: interp, run (JIT), build (AOT), repl.

## Done when
- New fixtures exist with `input.fz` plus the expected.* snapshots required by the matrix.
- `tests/fixture_matrix.rs` exercises them across all four legs and they pass.
- Refutable destructure runtime `match_error` is asserted in at least one fixture per leg.
title: T4: fixture-matrix parity for destructuring (all four legs)
